technology.title: Building tech in the world’s secret R&D hub
technology.summary: Apple. Anthropic. Disney Research. Google. Meta. Microsoft. NVIDIA. OpenAI. Few places outside Silicon Valley can claim R&D hubs from all of these companies. Fewer still are concentrated in a city of just over 400,000 people—roughly half the size of San Francisco. Over the past two decades, however, many of the world’s most influential technology companies…

briefing.news_focus: Apple. Anthropic. Disney Research. Google. Meta. Microsoft. NVIDIA. OpenAI. Few places outside Silicon Valley can claim R&D hubs from all of these companies. Fewer still are concentrated in a city of just over 400,000 people—roughly half the size of San Francisco. Over the past two decades, however, many of the world’s most influential technology companies…
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在全球科技產業中，少數城市能夠吸引多家頂尖公司的研發中心，其中一個例子是位於人口僅超過40萬的城市，這裡聚集了Apple、Google、Meta等科技巨頭的研發機構。這一現象在過去二十年中逐漸形成，顯示出該地區在全球科技創新中的重要性。
briefing.background: 隨著科技產業的快速發展，許多公司開始尋找新的研發基地，以便於吸引人才和資源。傳統上，矽谷是科技創新的核心，但隨著成本上升和市場需求變化，其他城市逐漸崛起成為新的研發中心。這些城市不僅提供相對較低的生活成本，還擁有良好的教育資源和創新氛圍，吸引了包括Apple、Google等在內的多家知名企業設立研發機構。
briefing.analysis: 這一現象反映出科技公司在全球範圍內尋求多元化的研發環境，以降低風險並提升創新能力。對於這些公司而言，選擇在新興城市設立研發中心不僅能夠吸引當地人才，還能夠利用當地的資源和政策支持。然而，這也可能引發當地社會對於科技公司影響的擔憂，包括生活成本上升和資源競爭等問題。未來，這些城市的發展將取決於如何平衡科技創新與社會責任之間的關係。

technology.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
technology.summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

briefing.news_focus: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Google 宣布將 Gemini 的個性化 AI 圖像生成服務擴展至美國的合格免費用戶，這項功能允許用戶根據其興趣及來自連接的 Google 應用程式的數據創建圖像。這一舉措旨在提升用戶體驗，並進一步推廣其 AI 技術的應用。
briefing.background: Gemini 是 Google 開發的一款 AI 聊天機器人，旨在提供更個性化的互動體驗。隨著 AI 技術的快速發展，市場上對於個性化內容生成的需求日益增加，許多科技公司都在積極探索此領域。Google 此次將 Gemini 的圖像生成服務免費提供給美國用戶，顯示出其對於擴大用戶基礎及提升產品競爭力的重視。此舉也可能是對於其他競爭者如 OpenAI 的 DALL-E 等產品的回應，旨在吸引更多用戶使用其生態系統。
briefing.analysis: Google 擴展 Gemini 的個性化 AI 圖像生成服務，可能會對其用戶增長和市場佔有率產生積極影響。這一策略不僅能吸引新用戶，還可能促進現有用戶對 Google 生態系統的黏著度。從商業角度看，免費服務的推出也可能是為了收集更多用戶數據，以進一步優化其 AI 算法和服務。另一方面，這一舉措也可能引發隱私和數據安全的討論，特別是在用戶數據被用於生成個性化內容的情況下。未來，Google 可能需要在推廣 AI 技術與保護用戶隱私之間找到平衡，以維持用戶信任和市場競爭力。

technology.title: Hong Kong IPOs ride China’s tech wave, but Nasdaq leads way with SpaceX tsunami
technology.summary: Hong Kong has surrendered its IPO fundraising crown to Nasdaq following SpaceX’s blockbuster listing earlier this month, but it did so while seeing its IPO proceeds register a year-on-year rise of about 84 per cent in the first half of 2026 – consolidating the region’s position as a primary offshore financial hub for Chinese issuers. A total of 83 companies raised US$26.42 billion on the Hong Kong stock exchange’s main board from January to June, according to LSEG Data & Analytics. The figure,...

briefing.news_focus: Hong Kong has surrendered its IPO fundraising crown to Nasdaq following SpaceX’s blockbuster listing earlier this month, but it did so while seeing its IPO proceeds register a year-on-year rise of about 84 per cent in the first half of 2026 – consolidating the region’s position as a primary offshore financial hub for Chinese issuers. A total of 83 companies raised US$26.42 billion on the Hong Kong stock exchange’s main board from January to June, according to LSEG Data & Analytics. The figure,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 香港在2026年上半年IPO籌資方面表現強勁，總共83家公司在香港主板上籌集了264.2億美元，較去年同期增長約84%。然而，香港的IPO籌資冠軍地位已被納斯達克取代，因為SpaceX在本月的上市引發了市場熱潮。儘管如此，香港仍穩固了其作為中國發行者主要離岸金融中心的地位。
briefing.background: 香港的IPO市場在過去幾年受到多重因素影響，包括中國經濟增長放緩及監管政策變化。隨著中國科技公司尋求在國際市場上籌集資金，香港作為主要的離岸金融中心，其IPO活動逐漸增長。2026年上半年，香港的IPO籌資額顯著上升，顯示出市場對中國科技公司的持續需求。與此同時，納斯達克因SpaceX的成功上市而重新獲得了IPO市場的主導地位，這使得香港面臨更大的競爭壓力。
briefing.analysis: 香港的IPO市場雖然在籌資額上有所增長，但面對納斯達克的競爭，特別是SpaceX的上市，顯示出全球資本市場的動態變化。香港的增長主要來自於中國科技公司的需求，這些公司希望利用香港的市場優勢來獲得資金。然而，隨著納斯達克吸引了大量投資者的注意，香港必須加強自身的市場吸引力，以維持其作為中國企業首選上市地的地位。未來，香港可能需要在監管政策和市場環境上進行調整，以應對來自納斯達克及其他國際市場的挑戰。

politics.title: Kash Patel draws flak for posting FBI case details on social media ‘to make himself look good’
politics.summary: FBI veterans believe director may have flouted legal rules by prematurely divulging details of UFC attack plot inquiry Kash Patel may have flouted legal constraints and the FBI’s disciplinary code in prematurely divulging arrests in an alleged plot to attack this month’s Ultimate Fighting Championship bout at the White House, bureau veterans have alleged. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: FBI veterans believe director may have flouted legal rules by prematurely divulging details of UFC attack plot inquiry Kash Patel may have flouted legal constraints and the FBI’s disciplinary code in prematurely divulging arrests in an alleged plot to attack this month’s Ultimate Fighting Championship bout at the White House, bureau veterans have alleged. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前美國國防部官員Kash Patel因在社交媒體上發布有關FBI調查UFC攻擊陰謀的細節而受到批評。FBI的資深成員指控他可能違反了法律規定，因為他在調查尚未結束時提前透露了逮捕的相關信息，這可能違反了FBI的紀律規範。
briefing.background: 在美國，FBI負責調查各類犯罪案件，包括恐怖主義和暴力事件。UFC（終極格鬥冠軍賽）是一項受歡迎的綜合格鬥賽事，吸引了大量觀眾和媒體關注。近期，關於UFC賽事的安全問題引起了廣泛關注，特別是在社交媒體上對事件的報導和討論。Kash Patel作為前國防部官員，其言論和行為受到公眾和媒體的高度關注，尤其是在涉及法律和安全的議題上。
briefing.analysis: Kash Patel的行為引發了FBI內部的強烈反對，資深成員認為他可能違反了法律和紀律規範，這可能會對FBI的聲譽造成損害。這一事件突顯了在社交媒體時代，官員在公開信息時需謹慎考量的必要性。Patel的行為可能被解讀為試圖提升自身形象，這在政治和公共安全的背景下引發了對其動機的質疑。未來，這一事件可能會促使FBI重新評估其內部信息披露的政策，以防止類似情況再次發生。

politics.title: Senior U.S. officials frustrated by Machado bid to return to Venezuela after quakes: White House official
politics.summary: Maria Corina Machado ⁠left Venezuela in December, defying a decade-long travel ban to receive the Nobel Peace Prize, after mainly living in hiding for more ​than a year following ‌disputed elections in 2024

briefing.news_focus: Maria Corina Machado ⁠left Venezuela in December, defying a decade-long travel ban to receive the Nobel Peace Prize, after mainly living in hiding for more ​than a year following ‌disputed elections in 2024
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國官員對於馬利亞·科琳娜·馬查多在地震後試圖返回委內瑞拉的行動感到沮喪。馬查多於2024年因選舉爭議而主要隱藏生活，並在去年12月違反長達十年的旅行禁令前往接受諾貝爾和平獎。白宮官員指出，馬查多的回國計劃引發了美方的擔憂。
briefing.background: 馬利亞·科琳娜·馬查多是委內瑞拉反對派的主要領導人之一，因其在2024年選舉中的爭議結果而受到國際關注。她的行動受到委內瑞拉政府的強烈抵制，並在過去十年內遭到旅行禁令。馬查多在接受諾貝爾和平獎後，試圖重返委內瑞拉，這一舉動可能會引發當地政治局勢的進一步緊張，尤其是在地震後，國內局勢不穩定的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 美國官員對馬查多的回國計劃表示不滿，這反映了美方對委內瑞拉政治局勢的高度關注。馬查多的返回可能會被視為對當前政府的挑戰，並可能引發新的政治動盪。美國在此事件中的立場顯示出對反對派的支持，但也顯示出對可能引發的衝突的擔憂。馬查多的行動可能會影響國際社會對委內瑞拉的看法，特別是在人道主義危機和政治改革的背景下。各方可能會密切關注馬查多的動向及其對當地局勢的影響。

politics.title: Hong Kong positioned to link Asean, Greater Bay Area amid geopolitical shifts: John Lee
politics.summary: Hong Kong is uniquely positioned to connect Asean with the Greater Bay Area and build a “powerful and complementary partnership” amid a shifting geopolitical landscape, the city’s leader has said. Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu made his remarks at the South China Morning Post’s GBA-Asean Summit 2026 on Tuesday, which also saw the launch of a new chamber of commerce for the 11-member Association of Southeast Asian Nations in the city. The summit brought together government officials, business...

briefing.news_focus: Hong Kong is uniquely positioned to connect Asean with the Greater Bay Area and build a “powerful and complementary partnership” amid a shifting geopolitical landscape, the city’s leader has said. Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu made his remarks at the South China Morning Post’s GBA-Asean Summit 2026 on Tuesday, which also saw the launch of a new chamber of commerce for the 11-member Association of Southeast Asian Nations in the city. The summit brought together government officials, business...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 香港特首李家超在南華早報舉辦的GBA-Asean峰會上表示，香港在地緣政治變遷中具備獨特優勢，能夠連接東南亞國家聯盟（ASEAN）與大灣區，並建立強大且互補的夥伴關係。此次峰會還啟動了一個新的商會，專注於促進香港與ASEAN成員國之間的商業合作。
briefing.background: 香港作為中國的一個特別行政區，歷來在國際貿易和金融中扮演重要角色。隨著地緣政治的變化，特別是中國與東南亞國家之間的關係日益緊密，香港的地理位置和經濟優勢使其成為連接這兩個地區的橋樑。ASEAN作為一個重要的區域組織，面臨來自中國的影響力擴張的挑戰，這使得香港的角色更加重要。此次峰會的舉辦，反映了香港希望在這一新興的地緣政治環境中，強化其作為貿易和投資中心的地位。
briefing.analysis: 李家超的發言強調了香港在連接ASEAN與大灣區的潛力，這對於促進貿易和投資至關重要。然而，根據參考報導，ASEAN國家對於北京的擴張野心持有警惕態度，這可能使得香港的角色面臨挑戰。各方利益關係複雜，ASEAN成員國在與中國的經濟合作中，必須平衡自身的國家利益與區域安全。未來，香港如何在這種複雜的地緣政治環境中維持其中介角色，將是觀察的重點。

supporting_titles: ASEAN has to stand up to Beijing’s ambitions

economy.title: Sainsbury’s chief says grocery inflation not as bad as feared so far
economy.summary: Supermarket has lifted sales with Aldi price match, and has benefited from hot weather and World Cup matches Business live – latest updates Grocery inflation in the UK has not been as bad as feared so far, the boss of Sainsbury’s has said, but “pressure in the system” remains as the industry hopes for a swift resolution to the Middle East conflict. Simon Roberts, the chief executive of the UK’s second-largest supermarket, said it was still early in the year and there was “still uncertainty where inflation will go”, but suggested it could come in well below the Food and Drink Federation’s initial prediction of at least 9% by December . Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Supermarket has lifted sales with Aldi price match, and has benefited from hot weather and World Cup matches Business live – latest updates Grocery inflation in the UK has not been as bad as feared so far, the boss of Sainsbury’s has said, but “pressure in the system” remains as the industry hopes for a swift resolution to the Middle East conflict. Simon Roberts, the chief executive of the UK’s second-largest supermarket, said it was still early in the year and there was “still uncertainty where inflation will go”, but suggested it could come in well below the Food and Drink Federation’s initial prediction of at least 9% by December . Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國超市Sainsbury's的首席執行官Simon Roberts表示，儘管市場仍面臨壓力，但目前的食品通脹情況並未如預期般嚴重。他指出，超市透過與Aldi的價格匹配提升了銷售，並且受益於熱天氣和世界杯賽事的影響。Roberts強調，儘管目前情況較好，但對於未來的通脹走勢仍存在不確定性，預測可能低於食品和飲料聯合會預測的9%。
briefing.background: 目前英國的食品通脹問題受到多重因素影響，包括全球供應鏈的挑戰和地緣政治的緊張局勢。特別是中東地區的衝突，可能對全球糧食供應造成影響，進而影響英國市場。Sainsbury's作為英國第二大超市，面臨來自競爭對手如Aldi的壓力，必須通過價格策略來吸引消費者。此外，近期的熱天氣和大型體育賽事也為超市帶來了額外的銷售機會，這些因素共同影響了當前的市場狀況。
briefing.analysis: Sainsbury's的首席執行官Roberts的言論反映出超市業界對於通脹的謹慎樂觀，儘管仍有不確定性。參考報導提到的美伊衝突可能會對中東基礎設施造成破壞，這可能進一步影響全球糧食供應鏈，從而影響英國的食品價格。各方利益關係中，消費者希望價格穩定，而超市則需在競爭中保持利潤。若中東局勢持續緊張，可能會使通脹壓力加大，導致Sainsbury's和其他超市面臨更大的挑戰。未來幾個月，市場將密切關注通脹數據及其對消費者行為的影響。

supporting_titles: How US-Iran conflict devastated infrastructure in the Middle East

economy.title: EU seeks ‘tangible results’ on China trade deficit by October
economy.summary: The European Union set an October deadline for “tangible results” in tackling its growing trade deficit with China, after the two sides held talks in Brussels in an attempt to avoid a trade war. “Not everything will be solved, not everything will be fixed, but we think that between now and October, our teams have sufficient time to deliver the tangible results,” EU trade chief Maros Sefcovic told reporters on Monday, according to Bloomberg News. He spoke after “intensive, focused and...

briefing.news_focus: The European Union set an October deadline for “tangible results” in tackling its growing trade deficit with China, after the two sides held talks in Brussels in an attempt to avoid a trade war. “Not everything will be solved, not everything will be fixed, but we think that between now and October, our teams have sufficient time to deliver the tangible results,” EU trade chief Maros Sefcovic told reporters on Monday, according to Bloomberg News. He spoke after “intensive, focused and...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐盟在布魯塞爾舉行會談後，設定了十月份的最後期限，要求在解決與中國之間日益擴大的貿易赤字方面取得“具體成果”。歐盟貿易負責人馬羅斯·塞夫科維奇表示，雖然並非所有問題都能解決，但雙方有足夠的時間來達成具體成果，以避免貿易戰的爆發。
briefing.background: 歐盟與中國之間的貿易關係在過去幾年中變得越來越不平衡，歐盟每年面臨約3600億歐元的貿易赤字。這一情況引發了歐盟內部的擔憂，尤其是在面對中國商品大量進口的背景下。近期，中國對歐盟可能採取的貿易限制措施發出威脅，進一步加劇了雙方緊張的貿易關係。此次會談是雙方七年來首次發表的聯合聲明，顯示出雙方希望通過正式的貿易諮詢來改善雙邊關係。
briefing.analysis: 歐盟希望在十月份之前達成具體成果，顯示出其對改善與中國貿易關係的迫切性。然而，雙方在貿易政策上的分歧仍然存在，特別是在中國對歐盟可能採取的貿易限制措施的反應上。參考報導指出，雙方在會談中同意進行為期三個月的討論，以期達成更平衡的貿易關係，這表明雙方都希望避免貿易戰的升級。與此同時，其他報導提到美國與中國之間的貿易衝突也在加劇，這可能對歐盟的談判策略產生影響，因為美國的貿易政策可能會影響中國的反應和歐盟的立場。

supporting_titles: EU sets up three months of talks with China over €360bn trade deficit
America and China return to fierce trade conflict
supporting_summaries: Two sides agree to try to make bilateral relationship ‘more balanced’ after weeks of threats The EU and China have agreed to enter three months of talks to try to avoid a trade war over the bloc’s €360bn (£310bn) annual import/export imbalance. In their first joint statement in seven years, the two sides agreed in Brussels to open a formal trade consultation after weeks of threats and recriminations from China if the EU imposed any measures to stop the flood of goods and components into the bloc. Continue reading...
Donald Trump threatens an extra 100% levy as rare-earth minerals prompt a fresh spat

economy.title: Why has India-U.S. trade deal been delayed? | Explained
economy.summary: From India’s Russian oil purchases to legal battles in Washington, the road to India-U.S. trade deal has become increasingly uncertain, and The Hindu explains why

briefing.news_focus: From India’s Russian oil purchases to legal battles in Washington, the road to India-U.S. trade deal has become increasingly uncertain, and The Hindu explains why
briefing.news_focus_zh: 印度與美國之間的貿易協議因多重因素而延遲，包括印度對俄羅斯石油的採購及華盛頓的法律糾紛。這些因素使得雙方的貿易談判變得越來越不確定，影響了原本預期的進展。
briefing.background: 印度與美國的貿易關係在過去幾年中逐漸增強，雙方都希望透過貿易協議來進一步擴大經濟合作。然而，印度對俄羅斯石油的購買在國際社會中引發了爭議，特別是在美國對俄羅斯的制裁背景下。此外，華盛頓的法律糾紛也可能影響貿易談判的進程，因為這些法律問題可能涉及貿易政策的調整和執行。
briefing.analysis: 印度與美國在貿易協議上的延遲反映了兩國之間的複雜關係。印度希望在能源安全方面維持與俄羅斯的合作，而美國則對此表示擔憂，認為這可能削弱其對俄羅斯的制裁效果。此外，法律糾紛可能涉及貿易政策的不同解讀，這使得雙方在談判中面臨更多挑戰。未來，若雙方能在能源政策及法律框架上達成共識，貿易協議的進展將有可能加速，否則，延遲的情況可能會持續。
